channel.title: The-Party on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in The-Party on smpaget blog

item.title: the Party
item.description:
Had a great night recently with several vagabonds, waifs, strays and beautiful human people. thanks go to Sarah for hosting us.
Carolann, Jacqueline, Peter, Andie, Heather, Lauren, and Susan for a lovely night. it was really good to sit around and discuss issues of
faith,
belief,
spirituality,
understanding,
and the stuff which makes life worth living. It was a wide ranging and good open discussion. I had felt slightly like that my belief structure was an mystery/blocakage to various people on the coure, peraps it was the whisky, but this discussion, perhaps showed how aware, or undersatnding of spiritual issues we all are and can be. good fun.
plans are afoot to do this with more regularity. if your interested. leave a comment technorati tags - sarah’s party, stuff of life
